cards.title: Detected power backends
cards.description: ryzenadj, HHD plugin, ACPI call, and SMU/ALIB are recognized as research backends.

cards.title: Device profile
cards.description: Known-device profiles and DMI autodetect are evidence inputs, not generated authority.

cards.title: Game profile source
cards.description: Steam AppID, executable, and Wine/Proton profile keys stay separated.

cards.title: Performance mode
cards.description: Silent, battery, balanced, performance, and turbo modes require numeric cap evidence.

cards.title: Battery cap
cards.description: Battery-aware caps are research evidence until power-supply state is proven at runtime.

cards.title: Stable sample/hysteresis
cards.description: Sample count, monitor interval, and ryzenadj delay are preserved as anti-oscillation guards.

cards.title: Mutation guard
cards.description: TDP writes, service changes, ACPI calls, SMU commands, and plugin moves require approval.

cards.title: Next controlled test
cards.description: A controlled test can be designed after backend, profile, and mutation boundaries are reviewed.
